plugin.name: Data-Link Auditor
plugin.description: Audit workbook-linked filenames against one or more source folders and export missing-value or missing-file reports.
title: Data-Link Auditor
description: Audit filenames referenced in an Excel workbook against multiple source folders, then optionally move confirmed matches into a destination structure.
dest.placeholder: Optional destination folder for moved matches...
checkbox.split: Split moved files into source-based subfolders
summary.empty: Choose a workbook and at least one source folder.
dialog.error.title: Missing Input
dialog.error.missing_excel: Choose an Excel workbook to validate.
dialog.error.missing_folders: Add at least one source folder.
dialog.error.missing_columns: Enter at least one column name.
